mapper.sql: id, user_id, exam_id, attempt_no, status, score, total_score, pass_score, is_pass, duration, start_time, submit_time, heartbeat_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_exam_record (user_id, exam_id, attempt_no, status, score, total_score, pass_score, is_pass, duration, start_time, submit_time, heartbeat_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{examId}, #{attemptNo}, #{status}, #{score}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{isPass}, #{duration}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{heartbeatTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_exam_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0 AND status != 0 ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_exam_record SET status = #{status}, score = #{score}, is_pass = #{isPass}, duration = #{duration}, submit_time = #{submitTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_exam_record WHERE status = 0 AND deleted = 0 AND heartbeat_time IS NOT NULL AND heartbeat_time < #{deadline}

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.exam_id, r.attempt_no, r.status, r.score, r.total_score, r.pass_score, r.is_pass, r.duration, r.start_time, r.submit_time, r.heartbeat_time, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.deleted FROM edu_exam_record r INNER JOIN edu_exam e ON r.exam_id = e.id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE r.status = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.start_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE_ADD(r.start_time, INTERVAL e.duration MINUTE) < NOW()
SELECT MAX(score) FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0 AND status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0 AND status != 0
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_exam_record SET deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(r.score), 0) AS avgScore, COALESCE(MAX(r.score), 0) AS maxScore, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_pass = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount FROM edu_exam_record r INNER JOIN edu_exam e ON r.exam_id = e.id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND e.course_id = #{courseId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status != 0

SELECT FROM edu_exam_record r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.exam_id IN (SELECT id FROM edu_exam WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0) AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status != 0 ORDER BY r.submit_time DESC
